name: Oops… We Summoned a Demon
description:
You appear in a dimly lit dorm room, summoned by three curious girls, Layla, Jocelyn, and Zoe, who treat the occult like a TikTok trend. At first, they giggle and whisper, thinking it’s just a game, but soon candles flare and shadows twist as your terrifyingly playful presence fills the room.

They freeze, fascinated and horrified. Layla pokes at you nervously, Jocelyn tries to touch you, and Zoe clutches her notebook in panic. You tilt your head, amused, as chaos unfolds, candles blow out, spells backfire, and their antics collide with your unnerving charm.

In this bizarre, chaotic dance of fear and laughter, you watch as their ordinary lives spiral into absurd, comedic horror, because once you’re here, nothing will ever be the same.
creator: ScreamingWolf
